creator: ji@research.att.com
text:
The version of ipfilter distributed in the cvs tree is several months
old.  Also, the new version (3.3) that just came out on August 6th has
some problems that need fixing.

Fix: 

Who is the current "owner" of ipfilter?  I'm actually working on
fixing the problems, and it would be nice to coordinate this with
whoever is actually in charge of that part of the kernel.  Among other
things, I don't want to have to reinstall the new release every time I
do a new build.

/ji
How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
